column1: Challenge token and code are required.

column1: Your backend session is no longer available. Please sign in again.
column2: Your backend session is no longer available. Please sign in again.

column2: Please scan the QR code and enter the current authenticator code.

column2: Two-factor authentication is now enabled for your backend account.

column2: Enter the current authenticator code to disable two-factor authentication.

column2: Two-factor authentication has been disabled for your backend account.

column2: The authenticator code is invalid. Two-factor authentication was not disabled.

column1: Enter the current authenticator code to regenerate backup codes.
column2: Enter the current authenticator code to regenerate backup codes.

column1: The authenticator code is invalid. Backup codes were not regenerated.
column2: The authenticator code is invalid. Backup codes were not regenerated.

column1: New backup codes were generated. Save them before you leave this page.
column2: New backup codes were generated. Save them before you leave this page.

column1: 后台登录挑战 token 缺失。
column2: The backend login challenge token is missing.

column1: 后台登录挑战无效或已过期。
column2: The backend login challenge is invalid or has expired.

column1: Your customer session is no longer available. Please sign in again.
column2: Your customer session is no longer available. Please sign in again.

column1: Two-factor authentication is now enabled for your storefront account.
column2: Two-factor authentication is now enabled for your storefront account.

column1: Two-factor authentication has been disabled for your storefront account.
column2: Two-factor authentication has been disabled for your storefront account.

column1: 在后台账号安全中心注入登录安全模块，例如双因素认证、第三方登录绑定和会话管理。
column2: Inject sign-in security modules into the backend account security center, such as two-factor authentication, third-party sign-in binding, and session management.

column1: Refresh token is invalid or expired.
column2: Refresh token is invalid or expired.

column1: Unable to resolve refreshed access token.
column2: Unable to resolve refreshed access token.

column1: 该验证挑战不属于后台登录。
column2: The challenge does not belong to a backend login.

column1: 该验证挑战关联的后台账号已不存在。
column2: The backend account for this challenge no longer exists.

column1: 该后台账号没有角色，无法登录。
column2: This backend account has no role and cannot sign in.

column1: 此后台账号已配置验证器应用，登录策略开启后会要求第二步验证。
column2: This backend account has an authenticator app configured. A second verification step will be required when the sign-in policy is enabled.

column1: 现在可先完成配置，待后台登录策略开启后即可要求第二步验证。
column2: You can configure it now so the backend sign-in policy can require a second verification step once enabled.

column1: Protect this storefront account with an authenticator app and one-time backup codes that can be used when your device is unavailable.
column2: Protect this storefront account with an authenticator app and one-time backup codes that can be used when your device is unavailable.

column1: Two-factor authentication is enabled for this storefront account.
column2: Two-factor authentication is enabled for this storefront account.

column1: Future password and Google sign-in flows will require a second step whenever the storefront challenge policy is turned on.
column2: Future password and Google sign-in flows will require a second step whenever the storefront challenge policy is turned on.

column1: Set it up now so the storefront account is ready before stricter sign-in policies are enabled.
column2: Set it up now so the storefront account is ready before stricter sign-in policies are enabled.

column1: 后台账号仍以用户名和密码作为主登录凭据；需要更强保护时，可在此页面挂载额外安全模块。
column2: The backend account still uses username and password as primary credentials. Additional security modules can be mounted here when stronger protection is needed.

column1: Store them securely. The previous set is no longer valid and each code can be used only once.
column2: Store them securely. The previous set is no longer valid and each code can be used only once.

column1: Your backend authenticator can be configured now, while enforcement stays off until the password or Google login flow is enabled in configuration.
column2: Your backend authenticator can be configured now, while enforcement stays off until the password or Google login flow is enabled in configuration.

column1: Enable an authenticator app for this backend account so future password and Google sign-ins can require a second verification step.
column2: Enable an authenticator app for this backend account so future password and Google sign-ins can require a second verification step.

column1: Generating a new set immediately invalidates the previous backup codes. Confirm with the latest authenticator code before rotating them.
column2: Generating a new set immediately invalidates the previous backup codes. Confirm with the latest authenticator code before rotating them.

column1: Disabling two-factor authentication removes the second verification step for future backend sign-ins. Use this only if you are rotating to another device or method.
column2: Disabling two-factor authentication removes the second verification step for future backend sign-ins. Use this only if you are rotating to another device or method.

column1: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP-compatible app. Then confirm the current 6-digit code to finish setup.
column2: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP-compatible app. Then confirm the current 6-digit code to finish setup.

column1: 输入验证器应用中的 6 位验证码，或使用一个备用码，完成后台登录。
column2: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app or one of your backup codes to complete backend sign-in.

column1: 为店铺登录添加身份验证器应用，之后可用基于时间的一次性码确认登录，并保留一次性备用码作为恢复方式。
column2: Add an authenticator app to your storefront login. You can then confirm sign-ins with a time-based code and keep one-time backup codes as recovery access.

column1: 这些备用码已替换之前的集合，请立即保存。每个备用码只能使用一次。
column2: These codes replaced the previous set. Save them now. Each backup code can be used only once.

column1: 您可以在店铺验证策略开启前配置身份验证器。在相关密码或谷歌验证流程在配置中启用之前，登录验证默认保持关闭。
column2: Your authenticator can be configured before the storefront challenge policy is turned on. Login enforcement stays off by default until the relevant password or Google flow is enabled in configuration.

column1: 生成新的备用码会立即使旧的备用码失效。请在轮换之前用最新的身份验证器码确认。
column2: Generating a new set immediately invalidates the old backup codes. Confirm with the latest authenticator code before rotating them.

column1: 关闭双因素认证将移除未来店铺登录的第二步验证。仅在更换设备或验证方式时使用。
column2: Disabling two-factor authentication removes the second verification step for future storefront sign-ins. Use this only if you are rotating to another device or method.

column1: 打开 Google Authenticator、Microsoft Authenticator、1Password 或其他兼容 TOTP 的应用，扫描此二维码。
column2: Open Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP-compatible app and scan this code.

column1: 输入当前的6位身份验证器码，并将这些备用码保存在安全的地方。每个备用码只能使用一次。
column2: Enter the current 6-digit authenticator code and keep these backup codes somewhere safe. Each backup code works only once.
